description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and a mix of white, brown, and red exterior finishes. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a small, landscaped front yard with two prominent trees and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The structure appears to have large windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area, bordered by greenery and additional fencing. The overall design is compact, single-story, and emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor areas. The materials and landscaping suggest a contemporary urban residence with a focus on privacy and efficient use of space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wooden fencing, landscaped yard, and large windows, designed for urban living. The exterior features white, brown, and red finishes with two prominent trees and a private garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance, paved walkway, two large trees, and the main gate with a clear view of the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the continuous wooden fence, and the flat roofline.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the private garden, back entrance, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear fence, garden area, and the overall width of the bungalow with both trees visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
